discrepancies.label: Single-witness fire vs cross-provider dual-witness 130R precedent
discrepancies.description: Slot 183 fired as single-witness (Claude only) under operator efficiency directive 'no more operator picks'. The M-axis cascade aggregation rule (130R section 6.3) was designed for dual-witness scenarios. Aggregation across 3 picks within a single witness is a structurally distinct application; LOW-MEDIUM band correctly reflects the single-provider reliance.
discrepancies.resolution: ACKNOWLEDGED; non-blocking. If any C-183-x amendment is contested at future operator review, a second-witness fire (e.g., Grok or GPT-5.5 ratification) can be staged.

discrepancies.label: C-183-1 mandatory re-vet semantics not yet exercised
discrepancies.description: The mandatory-re-vet trigger upgrade (per C-183-1) is installed as semantic policy but has no test case until first A.3.x operator overwrite occurs. Recommend SIARC governance log captures this so future re-vet fires can verify the discretionary->mandatory transition was respected.
discrepancies.resolution: RECORDED in SIARC governance ledger via SQL todo umbrella-v23-frontier-decision-packet description update.
